_comment: Answer key for a single EVTX WMI execution sample used by evidence/cases/mini-fleet/hosts/host-02/.
The evidence is EVTX-only, so the expected finding remains HYPOTHESIS and the honest top-line verdict is INDETERMINATE unless another artifact class corroborates it.
Local-only until upstream EVTX sample provenance is documented.
source_url: local-only EVTX attack-sample training case; raw fixture not redistributed
license: VERDICT-authored answer key; raw EVTX provenance must be verified before publishing or redistributing the fixture

findings.description: Remote WMI process execution appears in Security Event ID 4688 with WmiPrvSE.exe as the parent process
findings.artifact_hint: Security EVTX EID 4688 child process under WmiPrvSE.exe, with related network logon context
